summary: Iteration 190: UI Standardization Pack testing - Login/Register V2 pages, PhoneNumberField component usage across the app. All primary flows pass. Found 2 legacy pages (/auth, /cart) still using raw tel inputs but these are deprecated in favor of new V2 pages.

legacy_pages_with_raw_tel.issue: Old Auth page uses raw tel input without PhoneNumberField
legacy_pages_with_raw_tel.note: Legacy page - main auth is at /login and /register using V2 pages

legacy_pages_with_raw_tel.issue: Old Cart page uses raw tel input in delivery step
legacy_pages_with_raw_tel.note: Legacy page - main cart flow uses CartDrawerCompleteFlow with PhoneNumberField

critical_code_review_comments: Legacy pages Auth.js and Cart.js still exist at /auth and /cart routes with raw tel inputs. Consider deprecating or updating these pages to use PhoneNumberField for consistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Standardization Pack verified. All primary pages use PhoneNumberField. Legacy pages /auth and /cart still have raw tel inputs but are deprecated.

login_page_v2.description: Login page renders with split-panel layout, logo, and all form elements
login_page_v2.evidence: data-testid='login-page-v2' found, grid lg:grid-cols-2 layout, logo visible, all inputs with data-testid

register_page_v2.description: Register page renders with split-panel layout matching Login, uses PhoneNumberField
register_page_v2.evidence: data-testid='register-page-v2' found, PhoneNumberField with prefix select + tel input

login_flow.description: Login flow works with demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!

my_account_page_phone_fields.description: My Account page uses PhoneNumberField for contact, quote client, and address phones
my_account_page_phone_fields.evidence: Found 5 select elements and 5 tel inputs (PhoneNumberField pattern)

sales_assist_modal_phone.description: Sales Assist Modal uses PhoneNumberField with prefix dropdown
sales_assist_modal_phone.evidence: data-testid='sa-phone-prefix' is a select element, data-testid='sa-phone-number' is tel input

expansion_page_forms.description: Expansion Premium Page forms use PhoneNumberField
expansion_page_forms.evidence: Both Business Interest and Partner Application forms have PhoneNumberField

checkout_panel_phone.evidence: Code review confirms PhoneNumberField import and usage at line 161

account_checkout_phone.evidence: Code review confirms PhoneNumberField import and usage at line 248

soft_lead_capture_modal_phone.evidence: Code review confirms PhoneNumberField import and usage at line 115

cart_drawer_complete_flow_phone.description: CartDrawerCompleteFlow uses PhoneNumberField for all 3 phone fields
cart_drawer_complete_flow_phone.evidence: Code review confirms PhoneNumberField usage for client, recipient, and invoice phones

raw_materials_page_exclusion.description: RawMaterialsPage has 'Phone or email' hybrid field intentionally left as raw input
raw_materials_page_exclusion.evidence: Line 558 has placeholder='Phone or email' - hybrid field per requirements
